response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the entire video to analyze visual and audio content. 2. Identified four distinct scenes based on on-screen text and visuals: Joysound intro (00:00), 'Snapshot' album ad (00:06), 'Flashpoint' fan messages (00:30), and 'Flashpoint' concert end screen (04:39). 3. Evaluated all segments for vocal music. The video contains only spoken voiceovers and instrumental background music throughout. No vocal songs or performances were identified. 4. Set 'contains_vocal_music' to false and all song-related metadata fields to null for all identified scenes.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional clip for the VTuber group ReGLOSS, featuring an advertisement for their second album, 'Snapshot,' and a screen displaying fan messages for their 'Flashpoint' 1st Live concert. The audio consists solely of voiceovers and instrumental background music; there are no vocal music performances.

scenes.description: Introductory animation for a JOYSOUND karaoke promotion.
Advertisement for the ReGLOSS 2nd Album 'Snapshot' on vinyl and cassette.
A screen displaying a scrolling collection of fan messages for the 'ReGLOSS 1st Live: Flashpoint' concert.
Closing screen showing the 'Flashpoint' concert banner and 'The concert will be starting soon' text.
